raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/2024, Citibank received my Disputes and request for information. certified tracking number # XXXX and certified tracking number # XXXX it has been well over the timeline required by the FCRA to conduct a reasonable investigation pursuant to 15 USC 1681s2. yet they have failed to do so and the matter and these accounts are still in dispute. I have not received the required material disclosures pursuant to 15usc1601 ; about the finance charge, apr, optout notices and forms.
